nasb.text: I will punish her for the days of the Baals When she used to offer sacrifices to them And adorn herself with her earrings and jewelry, And follow her lovers, so that she forgot Me,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: And I will punish her for the feast days of the Baals when she burned offerings to them and adorned herself with her ring and jewelry, and went after her lovers and forgot me, declares the Lord.

cnv.text: 她在拜眾巴力的日子， 向他們燒香， 佩戴耳環首飾，打扮自己， 跟隨她那些愛人，卻把我遺忘，所以我必懲罰她。”這是耶和華說的。

ccb.text: 我要惩罚她， 因为她在节日向巴力烧香。 那时她戴耳环佩首饰， 追逐她的情人，把我忘记。 这是耶和华说的。
